title: calamintha alpina f. albiflora
intro: Calamintha alpina f. albiflora, also known as White Mountain Calamint, is a subspecies of the Calamintha alpina plant, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina f. albiflora include relief from digestive issues, reduction of stress and anxiety, and relief from pain and inflammation. Calamintha alpina f. albiflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures, salves, and poultices.
